expectations.text: Uses arc-runner-set as the runs-on value

expectations.evidence: Lines 14-15: permissions: contents: read, pull-requests: write

expectations.text: Only triggers on Go source file changes
expectations.evidence: Lines 8-12: paths filter for **.go, go.mod, go.sum, Makefile, vendor/**. Also has secondary git diff check in step.

expectations.text: Uses make bench as the benchmark command
Posts benchmark results as a PR comment
expectations.evidence: Lines 66-108: Uses gh api to find/update/create PR comment with benchstat results
